text:
Hunter × Hunter: Nen × Survivor is a mobile game developed by WonderPlanet that released on February 17 th , 2026 by Bushiroad Games.

Overview

The official Japanese website describes it as a survival roguelite, an action game in which players control unique characters and fight through an ever-growing number of approaching enemies. It has boss battles that incorporate gimmicks to express the tense battles seen in Hunter × Hunter.

Game Content

Chapters

Ch. 1: Milsy Wetlands
Enemies: Great Stamp, Businessmen, Construction Workers.
Boss: Noggin Lugging Tortoise, Tonpa
Ch. 2: Final Exam Venue
Boss: Hanzo

Playable Characters

Gon
Killua
Kurapika
Leorio
Hisoka
Netero
Machi
Bisky

Skills

Skills have a star rating, and when first added to your party, come at a ★☆☆☆☆ rating. When skills are selected again as an upgrade, their star rating increases. There are three categories of skills.

MEMBER Level Up

Kick|Gon: +1 Kick.

SUPPORT Strikes

White Goreinu|Goreinu: White Goreinu appears and charges across the field. 
Butler's Bullet|Gotoh: Shoots coins, rapid-firing at nearby enemies. 
Soaring Arrow|Pokkle: Fires arrows into the sky, raining them down at random nearby.
Level Up: +1 Arrow Count
EVOLVE: Arrow Count doubles.
Three Floating Hands: Dance|Shoot McMahon: Floating left hands track enemies.
Quick Attack|Razor: Throws a rebounding ball that knocks enemies back.
Level Up: +1 Ball OR Increases Ball speed (possibly at level instead of random)

Supporting characters may level up as well.

Defensive Items

Spider Eagle's Egg: Recover 0.5% HP every 5s
Martial Arts Uniform: Damage Taken -5%
Gungi: Basic Skill Cooldown -5%
Wristwatch: Basic Skill Duration +5%
Super Bazooka Cannon: Basic Skill Size +5%
Cell Phone: Aura Pickup Range +100%
Skateboard: Speed +5%
Wooden Vault: Jenny Gain +10%
Roasted Great Stamp: Max HP +5%
Hunter License: Aura Gain +5%
Ben's Knife: Damage Dealt +5%

Up to six can be held per run. Items may have an "evolve target" that their effect applies to.

Ability Enhancements

These compromise enhancements for characters in your party, and enhancements for skills selected. 

Nen Threads ★★☆☆☆|Machi: Increases Nen Thread size.
Nen Threads ★★★☆☆|Machi: Increases Nen Thread size.
Soaring Arrow ★★☆☆☆|Pokkle: +1 Arrow Count
The Chairman's Whim ★★☆☆☆|Netero: +1 Throw Count
The Chairman's Whim ★★★☆☆|Netero: Increases size.

Gameplay

The game plays as a Vampire-Survivors-like game, where characters use mobile device controls to dodge continually-spawning hordes of enemies, which need to be defeated to progress. Playing the standard "adventure" mode costs five energy; players acquire energy at a rate of one every X time and can store up to thirty. The usual "screen joystick" seen on many mobile games is hexagonal. Aura (XP) is dropped by defeated enemies, and players level up as Aura is collected. Whenever players level up, they are given the choice of one of three skills to select and upgrade their character with; upgrades are per-run and do not last between runs. Skills come with a supporting character, and a party may have up to three of them.

As time passes, other playable characters may join your party, until your party has three members, including the starting member.

The amount of enemies defeated in a single session is displayed in the top right of the UI.

Trivia

The first announcement of the game was on its website and published on October 3 rd , 2025.
Character illustrations for Nen × Survivor are expected to be released in Weekly Shonen Jump issue 45, released on October 6 th , 2025.
